data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: Amazon uses Transport Layer Security (TLS) to encrypt data in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2/1.3 to secure customer data from interception.

data.title: WAF & Shield
data.description: Web Application Firewall and AWS Shield protect against DDoS attacks.
data.technical_spec: Layered defenses with monitoring and mitigation strategies.

data.title: Data Protection
data.description: Strong encryption protocols for data at rest using AWS KMS.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for sensitive customer data.

data.title: IAM Practices
data.description: Robust Identity and Access Management to control service and user access.

data.title: SOC and Penetration Testing
data.description: Regular security audits and 24/7 monitored Security Operations Centers (SOCs).
data.technical_spec: Third-party audits and compliance with security standards.
